commands.review_summary:
The branch preserves Open WebUI UUID session keys across gateway, transcript, and Control UI URL paths, adds regression tests, and also adds Codex proxy/auth, compaction-auth, and account-routed send changes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main still canonicalizes bare UUID-like session keys through the default agent and applies Control UI URL session values unchanged, which matches the split-session path from the linked Open WebUI report.
